title: Enhanced Arsenal
description:
(MOD IS DISCONTINUED FOR NOW)
A simple mod adding new equipment to vanilla materials
body:
(THIS MOD HAS BEEN DISCONTINUED FOR NOW, I MAY UPDATE EVERY ONCE IN A WHILE)
Now available on curseforge!

A simple mod that adds more equipment using vanilla materials! In beta, so please report any bugs or give suggestions of what equipment i should do next.

So far there's: Obsidian, Emerald, Copper, Amethyst, and Glass equipment.

Obsidian equipment has the most durability in the game and is also the 2nd or 3rd best armor in the game, therefore it is somewhat difficult to make. In the future I plan to make it fire resistant when you wear and also give you a lot of blast resistance.

Emerald equipment is also pretty good armor, having almost as much durability as diamond armor. when wearing it, villager prices will drop, as they will respect you.

Copper equipment isn't very good, really just being upgraded stone tools and basically stone armor. But because of how easy it is to get copper, I made so that copper ore only drops one piece every time.

Amethyst equipment has roughly the same protection and durability as diamond armor. Just like obsidian armor, the armor is made from a different item from its tool

*New*

Glass equipment is very very weak and has the least durability in the game, but when wearing a full set of the armor, you will appear invisible, and the glass tools have a chance of making the mob you hit it with "bleed". I plan to add more features to the tools later.

Knives are like swords, but do less damage and are very lightweight, hence they are fast swinging. I plan to add more features to these knives in future updates.
